TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Samingaz

S.FORM: aiza tu tasa uvaaz uh inkaduan ma sia sisiuh izaun saicia saipuk at.
S.TRANSL: 有一個孩子撿到一隻青蛙，他把他抓起來養。
There is a kid who found a frog and kept it.

S.FORM: aiza amin saicia asu.
S.TRANSL: 然後他也有狗。
He also has a dog.

S.FORM: a min‘un in mas isaicia tu tas tu lumah.
S.TRANSL: 他們成了一家人。
They became a family.

S.FORM: a maupa cia naia tu madaidaz mas sisiuh cin a pin‘uni mas naicia tu tas tu lumah ung at aiza tu sanavan naia hai masabah.
S.TRANSL: 他們那樣疼愛這個青蛙，使他們成為一家人。然後有一個晚上，他們在睡覺。
They love the frog so much. They are a family. One night they are sleeping.

S.FORM: ai sadua s saicia tu is’uka.
S.TRANSL: 他看到，不見了。
He sees it is no longer there.

S.FORM: a usa maz a sisiuh a maupa cia amin asu a tu kikilim a lalunglung tu isa maz a sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 「青蛙在哪裡？」狗也那樣地一直邊吠叫地找。
“Where is the frog?”, the dog keeps searching and barking.

S.FORM: ung hai a miliskin naia tu ai na kuisa dii sisiuh a maupa cia tu mapatualiba naia.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們想著「咦？青蛙會去哪裡？」他們那樣互相抱著。
They hug each other and consider where the frog went.

S.FORM: tupaun saicia asu a tu na kudiip kata kilim mas tu sisiuh cia nii tu haipun tu ka aiza antaban mikua.
S.TRANSL: 他跟狗說：「我們要去找那個青蛙吧？不知道有沒有被拿走還是怎麼了。」
He says to the dog: ‘We are going to look for the frog. I have no idea if it is taken away.’

S.FORM: at mudaan naia maupa cia tu kikilim mas sia sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 他們出發，那樣一直尋找著青蛙。
Then they went away, looking for the frog like that.

S.FORM: iskanata a iskaisaisa iskavahlas.
S.TRANSL: 他們到外面，到每個地方，到河流。
They went outside, went everywhere, went to the river

S.FORM: aiza tu tasa dangian naicia lukis.
S.TRANSL: 他們住的地方有樹。
there is a tree where they live

S.FORM: aiza ang mai sia laak at maupa cia uvaaz a miliskin tu haipa nii tu tungnangadah saia laak cia.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有洞，孩子想他不知道是不是到洞裡面了。
There is a hole there. Then the child thinks if it hid in the hole.

S.FORM: idii saia malala’la tu sisiuh isa kasu.
S.TRANSL: 那裡他一直叫呼：青蛙你在哪裡？
Over there he keeps calling: “Frog where are you?”

S.FORM: ung at maz a asu hai usaduan mas isia lukis tu sia itu bahusaz tu sia lumah.
S.TRANSL: 然後，狗看到樹上的虎頭蜂窩。
Then, that dog sees the hornet’s nest in the tree.

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu isain cia amin a sisiuh at.
S.TRANSL: 他想，青蛙是否也在那邊？
He wonders, is the frog in there, too?

S.FORM: at vuhvuhun a maz a sia tu lukis a at nii tu haiap tu bahusaz a hai mais vuhvuhun naia hai na mun‘apav macisbai.
S.TRANSL: 樹就搖了，他就不知道搖了後虎頭蜂會逃出來。
Then the tree was shaken. He didn’t know the hornets will fly out when being shaken.

S.FORM: isia mavuhvuh tu sia asu cin hai kalinastuun kaliumanun maz a sia tu bahusaz a lananastu at.
S.TRANSL: 狗把虎頭蜂打落到地上。
The dog hits the hornets to the ground.

S.FORM: maz a sia tu bahusaz a hai minaskun.
S.TRANSL: 那些虎頭蜂聚在一起。
Those hornets were gathering.

S.FORM: hum miliskin tu na izaun asu an kalat.
S.TRANSL: 我想，狗會被拿去咬。
I think the dog would be taken and bitten.

S.FORM: maupa cia tu hum mudaan maz a sia tu bahusaz a na masinap mas sia tu asu cia ung at maz a uvaaz a hai tungnasia lukis dadaza.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂就那樣出來追狗，孩子就躲在樹上。
The hornets move that way to chase the dog, and then the child hides at the tree.

S.FORM: aupa aiza laak miliskin saia tu isain cia.
S.TRANSL: 因為有洞，所以他想會不會在裡面。
Because there is a hole he wonders if it is in there.

S.FORM: idii saia inkaduan isainsianastu tu sia batu tu sia laak cia kudadaza saia lukis tu laak cia malala’la tu isa kasu sisiuh.
S.TRANSL: 他在那裡找到在下面的石洞，爬上樹洞去，一直叫：「青蛙你在哪裡？」
He founds a stone hole below and climbed up the tree and yelled: “Where are you, frog?”

S.FORM: patahusngian a minkailas saia uh minkailas saia mun'apav hai cinhuza uvaaz a muhalhal isnanastu cia maisnasialukis cia.
S.TRANSL: 他被吵醒後出來，小孩子被嚇到，從樹上掉下來到地上。
He is waken up and then comes out. The child is shocked, falling from the tree to the ground.

S.FORM: makitmananu tu na masinap mai sia asu cin maz a asu hai maupa cia amin tu macisbai sisinapun mas bahusaz cia.
S.TRANSL: 那些虎頭蜂一窩蜂地要追那隻狗，然而狗就那樣跑給虎頭蜂追。
All the way, those hornets will chase that dog. The dog just runs away like that and is being chased by the hornets.

S.FORM: ung at aupa maz a uvaaz a hai muhalhal hai cinhuza cinpising.
S.TRANSL: 然後小朋友掉下而驚嚇害怕。
Then the child is shocked and afraid because he falls down.

S.FORM: kudadaza saia sia batu cia hai makas’aang saia tu hum aiza maz a tu ngabul.
S.TRANSL: 他爬到石頭上，他期待著鹿。
He climbs up the rock and anticipates the deer.

S.FORM: tu sia adii vaha a hai makas’aang tu lukis.
S.TRANSL: 說到那隻鹿，他以為是樹木。
As for that antler, he thinks it is a tree.

S.FORM: at talidamuan saicia minnadadaza batu cia malala’la tu ai sisiuh isa kasu.
S.TRANSL: 他緊抓著，站在石頭上面，一直叫喊：「嘿，青蛙你在哪裡？」
Then he holds it, standing on the rock and yelling out “where are you, frog?”

S.FORM: at maz a asu a hai makilavi amin mas sia tu uvaaz cin tungnangadah sia a batu cia a sisbai sia itu bahusaz tu sia sinsinap cia.
S.TRANSL: 然後那隻狗也跟著這個小孩躲到石頭裡面，逃離虎頭蜂的追趕。
Then that dog follows this kid hide beneath the stone, refraining from being chased by hornets.

S.FORM: at maupa cia naia tu malala’la at nii tu haiap tu maz a ngabul a hai talidamuan maz a sia tu a isaicia vaha a hai.
S.TRANSL: 他們就這樣一直叫，不知道他抓著的那個是鹿角。
They keep yelling like that, unaware that what they are holding onto are antlers.

S.FORM: ki’ama’amaun saicia macisbai maz a ngabul a.
S.TRANSL: 他背著他們逃跑了
It runs away with them on its back.

S.FORM: a makilavi amin sia tu asu a a kinkikinuz mas isain sia isaicia tu am a ai bunun cia maupa cia tu maz a ngabul a hai mudaan hai.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗跟在他的主人後面，就這樣，鹿就這樣走了。
The dog follows its master and the deer leaves.

S.FORM: sadu mas tanangaus tu na is’uk in a daan at.
S.TRANSL: 鹿看到他的前面已經沒有路了
The deer sees there is no more roads in front.

S.FORM: a isian sia mangdavan hai pan’utung a saia hai nii tu haiap tu maz a uvaaz a hai istaibiskav aupa uka mas sia mahunduh tu talinadaan.
S.TRANSL: 鹿在懸崖停了下來，不知道孩子因為沒抓緊被甩出去了。
The deers stops at the cliff, without knowing that kid is cast away because he does not hold tightly.

S.FORM: istaibiskav hai muhalhal naia lanangadah sia ’ung’ung.
S.TRANSL: 他們被丟落到溪谷裡面了。
Being cast, they drops into the gully.

S.FORM: a maupa cia naia tu a sungkat.
S.TRANSL: 他們就這樣過河
They cross the river.

S.FORM: a minnasian sia sisila a usaduan mas sia lukis tu sia a minunhanu tu mahaliv in.
S.TRANSL: （他們）到了河邊看到乾了的漂流木。
(They) arrive at the riverside and see a drift wood.

S.FORM: at aupa tupaun saicia asu a tu a kaa in matahusing aupa mais muhna kasu mutmang lalunglung hai a na maupa cia tu a usupahan mas isian sia painladuan maupa cia tu sia a cinhuzaun ma’ita mahtu inkaduan mas sisiuh cia hai maupa cia naia tu.
S.TRANSL: 他叫狗不要吵鬧，因為你再亂叫的話就會那樣，會遇到很多我們在找青蛙時遇到的事情那樣。
He tells the dog ‘Be quiet! If you bark again as you want, bad things like what we came across when we were seeking the frog will happen.’

S.FORM: tungnadadaza sia lukis cia hai isnadadaza naia sia lukis cia islunghu hai ais usaduan naia tu a supah daingaz hangsia sisiuh isain cin in.
S.TRANSL: 他們躲到枯木上休息時，看到原來有很多青蛙在這裡了。
When they hide and rest on the deadwood, they see so many frogs there.

S.FORM: a manaskal naia sadu sisiuh tu supah daingaz musasu saduan naicia hai ai avadii inaicia sinaipuk tu sisiuh a.
S.TRANSL: 當他們正高興看到很多青蛙時，他們看到了他們養的那隻青蛙。
While they are happy for seeing so many frogs, the find the frog they kept.

S.FORM: a suii aupahasia izaun naicia a maz a sia tu inaicia sathasan naicia sadu tu avadii sisiuh sinaipuk naicia hai izaun naicia at aupa.
S.TRANSL: 所以他們把那隻青蛙拿起來看青楚，是他們養的那隻青蛙。
So they take the frog and look at it. That is the frog they kept.
